codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the required script helpers and quoting behavior, with output chaining/indentation and warning header aligned to the feature contract. I found one minor parity gap versus the Ruby reference for worktree message source when no repo is provided.

issues.description: `script_worktree()` uses `repo.unwrap_or(".")` for the informational echo source, producing 'from .' when repo is None. Ruby reference uses `repo || Dir.pwd`, i.e., absolute current directory, so this diverges from the requested exact format parity.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for script-output-format. Feature is functionally complete and aligned with expected behaviors, with one non-blocking exact-format parity deviation in worktree informational echo text when repo is omitted.
